scores.rationale: It directly addresses the two-route marketing migration and the home/pricing comparison jobs.
Labeled navigation, CTA hierarchy, price-first comparison, focus treatment, and mobile ordering are consistently specified across routes.
Acceptance criteria and recovery rules cover responsive layout, pricing hierarchy, focus clipping, and conditional cadence behavior.
It creates an original surface from structural cues and explicitly rejects icon-only, shadow-heavy, and CTA-clutter patterns.
The candidate handles visible focus, labels, resize persistence, mobile comparison density, and state indicators without color-only reliance.
Source decisions are extensively cited, assumptions identify unresolved cadence and copy details, and uninspected routes are bounded.
